description_long: This is a compact, gold-colored armored combat vehicle with a boxy turret and a prominent main cannon mounted at the front. The vehicle features thick, riveted armor plating covering all sides, with visible bolts and reinforced panels, especially around the turret and hull. The tracks are wide and robust, designed for heavy-duty movement, and the rear houses dual cylindrical exhausts and additional armored covers. The sides display various hatches, vents, and storage compartments, while the front is dominated by the gun barrel and angular armor. The vehicle's surface is smooth with a metallic sheen, and there are no visible camouflage patterns or military insignia. The overall design suggests a focus on protection and firepower, suitable for urban tactical operations.
description: A gold, heavily armored combat vehicle with a boxy turret, main cannon, and wide tracks, featuring reinforced panels and a metallic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main cannon, thick frontal armor, and the symmetrical arrangement of the tracks and panels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the turret, side hatches, exhaust pipes, and additional storage compartments.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying dual exhausts, rear armor plating, and the back of the tracks.
description_view_3: Right side view with visible turret, side vents, hatches, and the continuation of the exhaust system.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the front of the turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, riveted steel armor plating; reinforced panels on the turret and hull; sloped and angular surfaces for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; solid gold color finish.
